overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City at dusk. The player traverses elevated walkways, covered pedestrian bridges with illuminated floors, and narrow neon-lit commercial streets while observing futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, and city traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway approaching covered bridge

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway overlooking the highway and futuristic cityscape

entered.detail: multi-level highway system with vehicles moving below
tall glass and steel towers with neon lighting
large floating digital billboards displaying advertisements
entrance to enclosed walkway with orange structural elements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking a busy futuristic highway. Flying vehicles traverse the multi-level roadways below while holographic advertisements float above. The camera approaches the entrance to a covered pedestrian bridge with orange structural accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian tunnel with illuminated floor panels

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered bridge with glowing floor panels

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward camera through the tunnel

entered.detail: arched tunnel structure with orange frame and mesh screening
glowing floor tiles displaying colorful light patterns
structural orange metal framing of the pedestrian tunnel

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an enclosed pedestrian tunnel featuring illuminated floor panels that glow with colorful patterns. The tunnel has an orange arched frame with mesh screening on the sides. A few pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the camera progresses toward the far exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway overlook with futuristic city views

events.description: exits covered pedestrian bridge onto open elevated walkway alongside highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the open overpass while observing the city traffic and skyline

entered.detail: open-air walkway with metal railings overlooking the highway
ground vehicles moving along the multi-lane highway below
safety railings along the edge of the elevated walkway
distinctive cylindrical tower with red neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered bridge, the scene opens to an elevated walkway alongside a busy highway. The camera moves past metal railings with views of traffic below and futuristic skyscrapers in the distance. A distinctive neon-lit tower dominates the left side of the skyline as the camera approaches a stairwell descent.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell descending to waterfront level

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs to lower waterfront level

agents.ego_description: descending the stairwell toward the lower level near the water

entered.detail: enclosed concrete staircase with integrated lighting
urban waterway running alongside the lower level
massive concrete pillars supporting the highway above

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a concrete stairwell from the elevated highway down to a lower waterfront level. The enclosed stairway features integrated lighting and views of the water canal through openings. Massive support pillars for the overhead highway dominate the space as the camera approaches the bottom landing.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor cafe seating area under highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the outdoor seating area observing people relaxing and a food vendor

notable_agents.action: person sitting on orange bench looking at phone
food vendor standing behind illuminated cart

entered.detail: enclosed seating area with artificial turf flooring under the overpass
bright orange seating benches with integrated lighting
rectangular planters containing spiky plants and flowers
mobile food vendor cart with umbrella and neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera enters an outdoor cafe seating area tucked under the highway overpass. The space features orange benches, concrete planters with spiky vegetation, and a food vendor cart with neon lighting. Several people are seated on benches using their phones or conversing, while the water canal is visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with neon storefronts

events.description: exits cafe seating area into narrow commercial alley with neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow commercial street passing pedestrians and neon-lit shops

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white suit standing near the Brooklyn Barista entrance

entered.detail: large pink neon sign reading BROOKLYN BARISTA on building facade
green neon open sign in oval shape on storefront
commercial shop fronts with illuminated signage and entrances
confined pedestrian street with buildings on both sides

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the cafe area into a narrow commercial alley lined with neon-lit storefronts. A prominent pink neon sign for Brooklyn Barista dominates the left side, while various shops with glowing open signs line the street. Pedestrians walk along the confined sidewalk beneath overhead walkways and holographic billboards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated highway overlook down into the neon-drenched commercial alleys of a futuristic city. It begins on a high pedestrian walkway overlooking multi-level roadways and floating holograms before gliding into an enclosed bridge characterized by glowing floor panels and orange structural arches. As the camera exits the tunnel, the view expands across a skyline of towering skyscrapers and a dominant neon tower, leading the way toward a concrete stairwell. The scene then descends through the integrated lighting of the stairs and beneath massive highway pillars, transitioning from the heights of the city to a waterfront cafe area with orange benches and spiky vegetation. Finally, the camera moves past the food vendors and water canal to enter a narrow commercial alley, where the environment shifts into a dense corridor of glowing storefronts and prominent pink neon signage.
